allow:
Bash(python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
root=Path\('ch07_accept'\)
root.mkdir\(exist_ok=True\)
topics=[
\('01_context_management.md','上下文管理','讨论如何在长会话中维护目标、约束、文件状态与决策依据。'\),
\('02_tool_calling.md','工具调用','讨论如何选择工具、读取文件、执行命令、检查错误并记录结果。'\),
\('03_memory_system.md','记忆系统','讨论长期偏好、项目线索、反馈记录与隐私边界。'\),
\('04_tui_acceptance.md','TUI验收','讨论终端界面验收中的步骤、观察点、通过标准与回归风险。'\),
\('05_context_compression.md','上下文压缩','讨论如何把冗长历史压缩为可执行摘要并保留关键证据。'\),
\('06_tool_error_recovery.md','工具错误恢复','讨论工具失败后的诊断、重试策略、替代方案与安全边界。'\),
\('07_memory_governance.md','记忆治理','讨论记忆写入、读取、遗忘、验证与避免过度持久化。'\),
\('08_tui_test_cases.md','TUI测试用例','讨论菜单、快捷键、输入焦点、颜色、窗口尺寸和键盘流程。'\),
\('09_context_and_tools.md','上下文与工具协同','讨论如何让上下文决定工具顺序并让工具结果更新上下文。'\),
\('10_memory_and_acceptance.md','记忆与验收','讨论如何用历史反馈辅助验收，同时以当前证据为准。'\),
\('11_tui_observability.md','TUI可观测性','讨论日志、截图、事件流、状态栏与可复现记录。'\),
\('12_final_acceptance_playbook.md','最终验收手册','讨论从准备、执行、记录到总结的完整TUI验收闭环。'\),
]
for idx,\(fname,title,desc\) in enumerate\(topics,1\):
    lines=[]
    lines.append\(f'# {title}'\)
    lines.append\(f'本文件属于 ch07_accept 项目的第 {idx:02d} 个验收资料，主题是：{title}。'\)
    lines.append\(desc\)
    for line_no in range\(4,201\):
        section=\(line_no-4\)//20+1
        lines.append\(f'第 {line_no:03d} 行：在第 {section} 组说明中，{title} 需要把上下文管理、工具调用、记忆系统和TUI验收联系起来；执行者应先明确目标，再用工具验证事实，必要时参考记忆线索，最后用可观察的TUI结果完成验收记录。'\)
    assert len\(lines\)==200
    \(root/fname\).write_text\('\\n'.join\(lines\)+'\\n', encoding='utf-8'\)
print\('created', len\(topics\), 'files with', sum\(1 for _ in root.glob\('*.md'\)\), 'markdown files'\)
PY)

Bash(python -c "from pathlib import Path; files=sorted\(Path\('ch07_accept'\).glob\('*.md'\)\); print\(len\(files\)\); [print\(f'{p.name}: {sum\(1 for _ in p.open\(encoding=\\'utf-8\\'\)\)} lines'\) for p in files]")

Bash($script = @'
from pathlib import Path
files=sorted\(Path\('ch07_accept'\).glob\('*.md'\)\)
print\(len\(files\)\)
for p in files:
    with p.open\(encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        count=sum\(1 for _ in f\)
    print\(f'{p.name}: {count} lines'\)
'@
$script | python -)

Bash($script = @'
from pathlib import Path
for p in sorted\(Path\('ch07_accept'\).glob\('*.md'\)\):
    text = p.read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)
    lines = text.splitlines\(\)
    title = lines[0].lstrip\('# '\).strip\(\) if lines else ''
    desc = lines[2] if len\(lines\) >= 3 else ''
    # Full file has been read into memory; print concise confirmation.
    print\(f'{p.name}\\t{len\(lines\)} lines\\t{title}\\t{desc}'\)
'@
$script | python -)
